user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter exits by initiation period, so that I can review exits started within a date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Enable Exit screen; When I set a From and To initiation period; Then only exits initiated in that range are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter exits by department and exit type, so that I can focus on a specific team or category of exit
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Enable Exit screen; When I select a department and an exit type; Then only matching exits are shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter exits by status, so that I can track them through resignation, approval, and FFS stages
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Enable Exit screen; When I select a status such as Resignation initiated, Approved, or Pending FFS; Then only matching exits are listed

user_story: As an approver, I want to act on exits pending with me via the Task column, so that I can move the exit process forward
acceptance_criteria: Given an exit has status Pending with me; When I open its Task; Then I can approve, cancel, or otherwise progress the exit

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see the exit initiation date and tentative last working day for each employee, so that I can plan the offboarding timeline
acceptance_criteria: Given exits are listed; When I view a row; Then I can see employee details, reporting manager, exit initiation date, and tentative last working day
